rulings.Case Title: NEW HORIZON TRUST ET AL VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER to Amended PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 14, 2025 line 1. RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEMURRER to Amended PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION is continued to February 14, 2025 for opposing party to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of opposition no later than January 24, 2025 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. (moving and reply received) =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: 737 PINE I1, LP VS. JUSTIN SATO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 14, 2025 line 5. PLAINTIFF 737 PINE I1, LP Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities is DENIED without prejudice . No authority is cited for the proposition that someone who never appeared in the action is a "party to pending litigation." The Court has no record of Justin Sato ever filing an appearance, paying a first appearance fee or obtaining a fee waiver in this case. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: SPI PROPERTY MANAGEMENT CORP. VS. VARADHARAJ AYYACHAMY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Notice Of Motion
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 14, 2025 line 8. PLAINTIFF SPI PROPERTY MANAGEMENT CORP. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Notice Of Motion is GRANTED. Moving party shifted their burden and opposing party failed to create a triable issue of fact with competent, admissible and relevant evidence. This action is based on a Notice demanding rent from December 2023. Defendant appears to claim habitability issues that have been abated per defendant's own admission no later than November 2023. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.
